title: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil...

description: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil tank, - local media. According to reports, the drones fell in the Latgale region. One of the drones was found near an oil storage facility in the city of Rezekne, approximately 40 km from the Russian border. According to local media, he crashed into an empty oil tank. There was no fire, but the rescuers had to cool the container. Second...
description_en: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil tank, - local media. According to reports, the drones fell in the Latgale region. One of the drones was found near an oil storage facility in the city of Rezekne, approximately 40 km from the Russian border. According to local media, he crashed into an empty oil tank. There was no fire, but the rescuers had to cool the container. Second...
description_uk: 😳 Два дрона со стороны россии залетели в Латвию, один врезался в нефтяной резервуар, - местные СМИ Как сообщается, беспилотники упали в регионе Латгалия. Один из дронов нашли рядом с нефтехранилищем в городе Резекне примерно в 40 км от российской границы. По данным местных СМИ, он врезался в пустой нефтяной резервуар. Возгорания не произошло, однако спасателям пришлось охлаждать емкость. Второй...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Ukraine’s railway operator deploys 800 modular shelters amid surge in attacks. Ukrzaliznytsia has recorded 983 attacks on railway infrastructure since the start of 2026, with strikes also hitting passenger trains and causing civilian casualties.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Russian attacks on Ukrainian first responders rise, follow ‘sustained pattern,’ report finds. The report describes the trend as a “deeply troubling trajectory in the war,” finding a sustained pattern in which responders are repeatedly targeted while carrying out rescue operations, including after arriving at strike sites.
description_en: Russian attacks on Ukrainian first responders rise, follow ‘sustained pattern,’ report finds. The report describes the trend as a “deeply troubling trajectory in the war,” finding a sustained pattern in which responders are repeatedly targeted while carrying out rescue operations, including after arriving at strike sites.

title: Attack attack
description: The body of the second victim was recovered from the rubble of a kindergarten in Sumy. Thus, the number of victims of the Russian strike increased to two - women aged 48 and 46 died. Seven more people were injured, OVA reports.
description_en: The body of the second victim was recovered from the rubble of a kindergarten in Sumy. Thus, the number of victims of the Russian strike increased to two - women aged 48 and 46 died. Seven more people were injured, OVA reports.
description_uk: Из-под завалов детсада в Сумах достали тело второй погибшей Таким образом число жертв российского удара выросло до двух — погибли женщины 48 и 46 лет. Еще семь человек пострадали, сообщают в ОВА.
